    Product Details

    [Prices during platform promotions]
    Price before the event: (1) In non-distribution scenarios, it refers to the sales price of goods before the warm-up period (or the peak period if there is no warm-up period) of the platform event (excluding the event in the distribution scenario); (2) In the distribution scenario, it specifically refers to the sales price of goods before the warm-up period (or the peak period if there is no warm-up period) of the distribution event.
    The aforementioned prices do not include various platform-issued subsidies, cross-store coupons, red envelopes, or other discounts, nor do they include merchant-set discounts such as minimum purchase requirements, coupons, store rebates, store member discounts, L-member prices, and merchant-set single-item discounts for specific groups. These prices will include other non-platform promotional discounts (including merchant-set single-item discounts for non-specific groups, the final price being determined by the merchant). The aforementioned product sales price refers to the price displayed on the product page on the day of purchase; if the merchant adjusts the sales price multiple times on the same day, the last displayed sales price will be used.
    [Price outside of platform promotions]
    The crossed-out price refers to the product price under the merchant's self-marketing campaign scenario. This price does not include various promotional activities on the platform. It may be the product's manufacturer's suggested retail price or a previously displayed selling price, not the original price, and is for reference only.
    Unmarked price: The selling price set by the merchant on the 1688 platform. The actual transaction price may vary depending on the various promotional activities set by the merchant, and the final price is subject to the price on the order settlement page.
    [List Price]
    This refers to the listed price of the product on the 1688 platform, which is set by the merchant and then discounted by the L member price. It is not the original price and is for reference only.
    [Total Sales Volume Across the Internet]
    This refers to the cumulative sales volume of the same product across multiple platforms (including Taobao, Tmall, and other e-commerce platforms).
    Similar products: refers to products that are highly similar in multiple dimensions such as name, appearance, specifications, ingredients, color, material, efficacy, and function, but does not mean that the two have completely identical brands, quality, efficacy, or functions.
    *Note:
    1. The foregoing explanation applies only to scenarios involving price comparison.
    2. The time before the event is usually the day before the warm-up period/peak period, but due to the delay of data, the price collection time may change. The final price shall be subject to the specific time and corresponding product price shown above.
    Content Disclaimer: Alibaba China is a third-party trading platform and internet information service provider. The titles, prices, details, and other information of goods/services displayed on Alibaba China (including the website, client, etc.) are published by the store operators, who are responsible for their authenticity, accuracy, and legality. Alibaba reminds you to carefully verify information before purchasing goods/services. If you have any questions about the titles, prices, details, or any other information of the goods/services, please communicate with the store operator via AliWangwang before purchasing. Alibaba China hosts a large number of stores; if you find any illegal/infringing information in a store, please report it to Alibaba immediately and provide valid clues.
